ast.target: @supabase/gotrue-js: Navigator LockManager 使用 #request 且未设置 ifAvailable 时返回空锁，此浏览器未遵循 LockManager 规范

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Multiple GoTrueClient instances detected in the same browser context. It is not an error, but this should be avoided as it may produce undefined behavior when used concurrently under the same storage key.
ast.target: 检测到同一浏览器上下文中存在多个 GoTrueClient 实例。虽非错误，但应避免，以免在相同存储键下并发使用时产生未定义行为

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Using the user object as returned from supabase.auth.getSession() or from some supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange() events could be insecure! This value comes directly from the storage medium (usually cookies on the server) and may not be authentic. Use supabase.auth.getUser() instead which authenticates the data by contacting the Supabase Auth server.
ast.target: 使用 supabase.auth.getSession() 或 onAuthStateChange() 返回的用户对象可能不安全！该值直接来自存储介质，可能未经验证。请改用 supabase.auth.getUser() 以通过 Supabase Auth 服务器验证数据

ast.source: Manage login credentials for accessing content from password-protected sources like cloud storage (WebDAV, Nextcloud) and private file servers. These credentials are securely stored locally and used to stream media and files.
ast.target: 管理登录凭据，以访问来自密码保护源（如云存储 WebDAV、Nextcloud）和私有文件服务器的内容。凭据安全存储在本地，用于流式传输媒体和文件。
